hero_title: Is Your Job Application Going Into a Black Hole?
hero_subtitle: Report your hiring experience. Hold companies accountable. Make recruitment transparent.
problem_text: 68% of job applicants never hear back. AI screening rejects qualified candidates. You deserve to know how companies treat applicants.
step1: Submit an anonymous report about your hiring experience
step2: Companies get rated on their Human-First Score
step3: Better data leads to better hiring practices
submit_rejection_email: Did you receive a rejection email?
submit_success: Thank you! Your report has been submitted.
company_no_reports: No reports yet. Be the first to share your experience!
claim_subtitle: Verify your company email to manage your profile, respond to reports, and improve your score.
claim_sent: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.
audit_subtitle: Get certified. Show candidates you put humans first.
rights_subtitle: Under EU regulations, you have the right to know how your application was processed.
rights_gdpr: GDPR Article 22: Right to not be subject to automated decision-making
rights_ai_act: EU AI Act: AI systems in employment must be transparent
footer_about: HireSignal makes hiring transparent. Built in Estonia, for the EU.
